memoryArtifacts.description: Lady Clemence DeBlore was born in 1234 in Hooton, Cheshire, England. She married Sir William DeStanley in 1253 in her hometown. They had one child during their marriage. She died in 1270 in Cheshire, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Clemence de Blore於1181年出生在英國爾易亞斯坦時，她的父親William Blore26歲，母親F Blore26歲。她於1204年與Sir William Walter de Stanley在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1287年3月1日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年106歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clemence de Blore于1181年出生在英国爾易亞斯坦时，她的父亲William Blore26岁，母亲F Blore26岁。她于1204年与Sir William Walter de Stanley在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1287年3月1日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾享年106岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Blore in Staffordshire, possibly named from Old English blōr ‘swelling, hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Clemence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French and English form of Latin Clementia, a derivative of Clemens ( see Clement ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘mercy’. It was fairly popular in Britain from the late medieval period until the 17th century, but has since been used less often.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Clemence de Blore was born in 1181, in Eastham, Cheshire, England, her father, William Blore, was 26 and her mother, F Blore, was 26. She married Sir William Walter de Stanley in 1204, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died on 1 March 1287, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 106.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clemence de Blore est née en 1181, à Eastham, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William Blore, avait 26 ans et sa mère, F Blore, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Walter de Stanley en 1204, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 mars 1287, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 106 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Clemence de Bloreが1181年にイギリスチェシュアイアエアスサムで生まれた時，父William Bloreは26歳，母F Bloreは26歳であった。1204年にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir William Walter de Stanleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1287年3月1日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで106歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Clemence de Blore(이)가 1181년 영국 체실르 이스섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Blore(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 F Blore(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1204년 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir William Walter de Stanley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1287년 3월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 106세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clemence de Blore nasceu em 1181, em Eastham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Blore, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, F Blore, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Walter de Stanley em 1204, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1 de março de 1287, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 106 anos.

ru.Stoke On Trent, Staffordshire, England: сток он трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clemence de Blore родилась в 1181 г. в местности эастам, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Blore было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали F Blore, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Walter de Stanley в 1204 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла 1 марта 1287 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 106 лет.
